name: Green-Tomato Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 cup seeded green tomatoes, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the poblano pepper.
2. Peel it and remove the core and seeds, then discard them.
3. Chop the roasted poblano pepper.
4. Mix the chopped poblano pepper with the remaining ingredients in a medium-sized bowl.
